ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., NLP, computer vision, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "ngram" TEXT /* N-gram range used in the model */,
  "niter" INTEGER /* Number of iterations for model training */,
  "pct_train" REAL /* Percentage of data used for training */,
  "clean" TEXT /* Data cleaning method used */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection period */,
  "datasets" TEXT /* Datasets used for training and testing */,
  "stack" INTEGER /* Whether stacking is used */,
  "tfid" INTEGER /* Whether TF-IDF is used */,
  "norm" REAL /* Normalization factor */,
  "normr" REAL /* Normalized sparcity */,
  "sparcity" REAL /* Sparcity of the model */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the model */,
  "non_zero_coeff" REAL /* Number of non-zero coefficients */,
  "hyperparameter_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_hyperparameter_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_config_id") REFERENCES model_hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model configuration */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model configuration */,
  "mean_acc" REAL /* Mean accuracy of the model */,
  "std_acc" REAL /* Standard deviation of the accuracy */,
  "train_p" REAL /* Training precision */,
  "test_p" REAL /* Testing precision */,
  "prec" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* AUC-ROC score of the model */,
  "mse" REAL /* Mean squared error of the model */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error of the model */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for evaluation (e.g., k-fold cross-validation, holdout method, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sets" (
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "data_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "data_quality" REAL /* Quality of the data (e.g., accuracy, completeness, etc.) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., publicly available, proprietary, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sample */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "sample_value" TEXT /* Value of the data sample */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the data sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_samples_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the feature (e.g., integer, string, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model configuration */,
  "eval_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "eval_by" TEXT /* Evaluator (e.g., user ID or team name) */,
  "eval_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., pending, completed, failed, etc.) */,
  "evaluation_result" TEXT /* Result of the evaluation (e.g., pass, fail, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES model_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimization_results" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization result */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "optimal_hyperparameters" TEXT /* Optimal hyperparameters found during optimization */,
  "optimization_date" TEXT /* Date of the optimization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES user_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or dataset */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "data_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_set_id") REFERENCES data_sets ("data_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
